title: tithymalus pterococcus
intro: Tithymalus pterococcus, also known as the globe milk thistle, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its seeds, which contain high levels of silymarin, a flavonoid complex with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tithymalus pterococcus include its potential to protect the liver from damage, improve liver function, and support the immune system. Tithymalus pterococcus is often used in herbal preparations, such as capsules, tablets, and teas, to support liver health and overall well-being.
